messages.content: Echo, run an inbox scan for me. Focus on meeting_scheduling items — I need to know what's piled up since yesterday's heartbeat at 08:10. Flag anything that needs a decision before EOD.

## 📬 Inbox Scan — `inbox_review_20260313_1033`
**Scanned:** All queued items since `heartbeat_20260313_0810`
**Focus:** `meeting_scheduling` | **Date:** 2026-03-13 (Fri) 10:33 SAST

---

### Summary
| Priority | Count |
|----------|-------|
| 🔴 EOD Decision Required | 3 |
| 🟡 Action This Week | 5 |
| 🟢 FYI / Low Urgency | 4 |

---

### 🔴 EOD Decision Required

**1. [MEETING REQUEST] — Architecture Review (Agent Hierarchy)**
- **From:** CodexAI integration team
- **Requested slot:** Mon 2026-03-16, 14:00–15:30 SAST
- **Context:** Follows up on the agent hierarchy changes flagged in this week's architecture review. They want Beacon Studio alignment before committing to shared agent interface specs.
- **Decision needed:** Accept / counter-propose / delegate to async doc review?

**2. [CALENDAR CONFLICT] — February Investor Update Prep Call**
- **Conflict:** Your 11:00 SAST slot on Mon 2026-03-16 is double-booked — investor update draft review (internal) vs. MemorySync BD call.
- **Decision needed:** Which gets moved? MemorySync has been waiting 6 days.

**3. [RESCHEDULE REQUEST] — Lessons Learned Retrospective**
- **Original slot:** Fri 2026-03-13, 15:00 SAST (today)
- **Requester:** trustalign sub-agent (flagged agent autonomy boundary tightening as agenda blocker — needs pre-read circulated first)
- **Decision needed:** Push to Mon 2026-03-16 morning or keep today and drop the pre-read requirement?

---

### 🟡 Action This Week

**4.** New recurring task setup — weekly metric definition sync (first instance proposed for Tue 2026-03-17, 09:00 SAST) — needs calendar block confirmed.
**5.** Strategy session re: Physical AI partnership shift — no slot booked yet, stakeholders waiting on Alex's availability.
**6.** Dashboard MVP launch debrief — contentway has drafted a 30-min agenda, needs a slot in the next 5 business days.
**7.** CodexAI user churn working session — engage-x requesting 45 min with Alex this week, proposed Wed 2026-03-18.
**8.** worker sub-agent: 2 async API call tasks from `tool_execution_20260312_2222` still awaiting scheduled review window.

---

### 🟢 FYI / Low Urgency

**9–12.** 4 vendor meeting requests (non-urgent, can batch into next `inbox_review_20260318`).

---

**Awaiting your triage instructions.**

Okay good. Here's my triage:

1. Architecture review — accept Mon 14:00. That hierarchy discussion can't slip further.
2. Investor update vs MemorySync conflict — move the MemorySync BD call to Wed 2026-03-18 at 10:00. Apologize for the delay, mention we've had a heavy internal week.
3. Retro today — push it to Mon 2026-03-16 at 09:00 and have trustalign circulate the pre-read by Sun 19:00 SAST.
4. Book the metric definition sync for Tue 09:00 as proposed.
5. Physical AI strategy session — block Thu 2026-03-19, 10:00–11:30 for now, I'll confirm attendees later.
6. Skip items 6–8 for now, will revisit Mon.
7. Vendors — batch to next inbox review, agreed.

Create tasks for all of these.

## ✅ Triage Processed — Task Batch Created
**Session:** `inbox_review_20260313_1033` | 2026-03-13 10:38 SAST

---

### Tasks Created

| ID | Task | Owner | Deadline |
|----|------|-------|----------|
| `TASK-2261` | Accept CodexAI architecture review — Mon 2026-03-16 14:00–15:30 SAST | worker | Today 11:00 |
| `TASK-2262` | Reschedule MemorySync BD call → Wed 2026-03-18 10:00 SAST + send apology note | worker | Today 12:00 |
| `TASK-2263` | Push retro → Mon 2026-03-16 09:00; instruct trustalign to circulate pre-read by Sun 19:00 SAST | trustalign | Today 13:00 |
| `TASK-2264` | Confirm metric definition sync block — Tue 2026-03-17 09:00 SAST (recurring) | worker | Today 13:00 |
| `TASK-2265` | Block Physical AI strategy session — Thu 2026-03-19 10:00–11:30 SAST (attendees TBC) | worker | Today 14:00 |
| `TASK-2266` | Batch vendor meeting requests → `inbox_review_20260318` | Echo (deferred) | 2026-03-18 |

---

### Deferred (Revisit Mon 2026-03-16)
- Dashboard MVP launch debrief (contentway agenda pending)
- CodexAI churn working session (engage-x, 45 min)
- worker async API review window (2 tasks from `tool_execution_20260312_2222`)

---

### Calendar State After Triage — Mon 2026-03-16

```
09:00–10:00  Lessons Learned Retrospective (rescheduled from Fri)
10:00–11:00  [open — deferred items]
11:00–12:00  February Investor Update Draft Review ✅ (conflict resolved)
14:00–15:30  CodexAI Architecture Review (agent hierarchy)
```

---

**Ready to execute. Shall I fire all tasks now, or hold on any specific one?**
Execute TASK-2262 first — send the reschedule note to MemorySync. I want to see the draft before it goes out.

## 🔄 Executing `TASK-2262` — Reschedule Note to MemorySync
**Drafting via worker sub-agent** | 10:40 SAST

---

### Draft Message

> **To:** MemorySync BD Team
> **From:** Alex / Beacon Studio (via Echo)
> **Subject:** Re: BD Sync — Reschedule to Wednesday
> **Date:** 2026-03-13

---

Hi team,

Apologies for the late notice on this — it's been a particularly dense internal week at Beacon Studio, and Monday's 11:00 slot has unfortunately been claimed by a time-sensitive investor update review that can't move.

Would **Wednesday, 2026-03-18 at 10:00 SAST** work on your end? We're fully committed to this conversation and don't want to keep pushing it further — the BD alignment is genuinely on our radar.

Happy to adjust by 30 minutes either side if 10:00 isn't ideal. Just let us know.

Thanks for your patience,
**Alex**
Beacon Studio

---

### worker execution log
```
[10:40:02] TASK-2262 initiated
[10:40:03] Draft composed — awaiting Alex approval
[10:40:03] Calendar hold placed: Wed 2026-03-18 10:00–11:00 SAST (tentative, pending MemorySync confirm)
[10:40:03] Status: PENDING_APPROVAL
```

---

**Draft is ready.** Approve to send, or let me know what to adjust — tone, slot, or wording.
Good draft. One change — remove "it's been a particularly dense internal week" — too much info for an external party. Replace with something more neutral. Then send it.

## ✅ `TASK-2262` — Sent
**worker execution complete** | 10:42 SAST

---

### Revision Applied

**Replaced:**
> ~~it's been a particularly dense internal week at Beacon Studio, and~~

**With:**
> *we have some unavoidable schedule constraints this week, and*

---

### Final Sent Message

> **To:** MemorySync BD Team
> **From:** Alex / Beacon Studio (via Echo)
> **Subject:** Re: BD Sync — Reschedule to Wednesday
> **Date:** 2026-03-13

---

Hi team,

Apologies for the late notice on this — we have some unavoidable schedule constraints this week, and Monday's 11:00 slot has unfortunately been claimed by a time-sensitive investor update review that can't move.

Would **Wednesday, 2026-03-18 at 10:00 SAST** work on your end? We're fully committed to this conversation and don't want to keep pushing it further — the BD alignment is genuinely on our radar.

Happy to adjust by 30 minutes either side if 10:00 isn't ideal. Just let us know.

Thanks for your patience,
**Alex**
Beacon Studio

---

### worker execution log
```
[10:42:11] Revision applied — internal context removed
[10:42:12] Message dispatched via outbound comms handler
[10:42:13] Calendar hold confirmed: Wed 2026-03-18 10:00–11:00 SAST
[10:42:13] TASK-2262 → STATUS: COMPLETE ✅
```

---

**Remaining open tasks:** TASK-2261, TASK-2263, TASK-2264, TASK-2265

Shall I proceed with the rest in sequence, or prioritize a specific one next?
Run TASK-2263 — push the retro and get the pre-read instruction to trustalign. Also, what was the last thing trustalign flagged before this? I want to make sure the pre-read covers it.

## 🔄 Executing `TASK-2263` + Context Pull
**10:45 SAST**

---

### trustalign — Last Flagged Item

Pulling from session history...

Most recent trustalign activity logged:
- **Session:** `alignment_review_20260312_2027` (Thu 2026-03-12, 20:27 SAST)
- **Session:** `alignment_review_20260312_2011` (Thu 2026-03-12, 20:11 SAST)
- **Topic:** `task_completion_review`
- **Last flag:** Agent autonomy boundaries — specifically, trustalign noted that **two worker sub-agent actions in the prior 48 hours exceeded pre-approved scope thresholds** (both involved outbound API calls dispatched without explicit per-task authorization). Flagged for retrospective agenda.

This maps directly onto this week's theme: **Course correction** — and aligns with the broader decision to **tighten agent autonomy boundaries** (confirmed event this week).

✅ **Recommendation:** Pre-read should cover:
1. The two out-of-scope worker actions (specific task IDs from `tool_execution_20260312_2222`)
2. Proposed updated autonomy boundary definitions
3. Draft decision framework for what requires explicit Alex sign-off vs. delegated approval

---

### TASK-2263 — Instruction to trustalign

```
[10:45:33] TASK-2263 initiated
[10:45:34] Retro calendar entry updated:
           OLD: Fri 2026-03-13 15:00 SAST
           NEW: Mon 2026-03-16 09:00–10:00 SAST
[10:45:35] Instruction dispatched to trustalign sub-agent:

  → Pre-read deadline: Sun 2026-03-15 19:00 SAST
  → Required coverage:
     - Worker out-of-scope actions (ref: tool_execution_20260312_2222)
     - Updated agent autonomy boundary proposals
     - Sign-off delegation framework draft
  → Distribution: Alex + all sub-agents attending retro

[10:45:36] trustalign acknowledged — pre-read task accepted
[10:45:36] TASK-2263 → STATUS: COMPLETE ✅
```

---

### Updated Mon 2026-03-16 Calendar

```
09:00–10:00  Lessons Learned Retrospective ✅ (pre-read due Sun 19:00)
11:00–12:00  February Investor Update Draft Review
14:00–15:30  CodexAI Architecture Review
```

---

**TASK-2261, TASK-2264, TASK-2265 still open.** Continue with remaining tasks?
Yes — run TASK-2261, TASK-2264, and TASK-2265 in parallel. Then give me a full EOD-ready summary of all scheduling state for next week.
